author: Michael Makarov
description: Run Claude Code, Codex, Grok, AntiGravity, Gemini CLI, and OpenCode as local AI agents in your vault, with chat, inline editing, and tools. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: Run Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity CLI, Gemini CLI, and OpenCode as local AI agents in your vault, with chat, inline editing, and tools.
